titleStmt.title: SII 37.190: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 190. (A.R. No. B 110 of 1939-40.) Tiruvattiyūr, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District.

summary.p: East wall of the Naṭarāja maṇḍapa, Vēdapurīśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1466, Plavanga, Pushya ba. 10, Thursday. Irregular.
It records the renovation of the yāgaśāla and kitchen in the temple of god Vēdapurīśvara at Tiruvaṭṭūr and the gift of some ornaments to the god by Daḷavāyi Gōpanāyiṅgāru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śaka varuṣaṁbulu 1466 Agunēṭi plavaṁga saṁvatsaraṁ puṣya ba 10 gu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī sadāsivadēvamahārāyalu vidyanagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhāsanārūḍhuḍai prithivi sāṁbrāṁjyaṁ śēyucuṁḍaṁgānu mayadanama gāriki puṁṇyaṁgā ni daḷavāyi gōpanāyanigāru tiruvatturi vēdapurīśvaruni pū nagāḍani vuṁḍina naṁdi sēyi ciluvānyaṁ karaniṁ sēyiṁci samarpiṁci luṁgāru tiruvā ṇālaku vivaraṁ nāgā śāraṇaṁ jaṭunu kāṭuṁlalāṭu saṭṭu
Ādārakāṭlakiṁṭu ṁgāru tiruvāsiṁni yidi modalayina tiru raṇālu samarpiṁci khilamaina yāgaśālānu maḍapakiṁni kaṭṭiṁciri nūṟaga la maṁḍulōna vasaṁtta tiruṇāḷa mahōtsa nu nu tirupaṇikiṁni ṇayiciri yī puṇyānaku yevaru Ahitaṁ vaṁcinavāru gaṁgātīrāna gōbrāṁhmala vadhiṁci pāpānapōṁgalavāru dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānācchrēyōnupālanaṁ dānātsvarggamavāpnōti pālanādacyutapadaṁ . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ
Digital edition of SII 37.190 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
